gosh: interjection. A mild expression of surprise or enthusiasm.

posh: adjective. Associated with the upper classes.
posing: adjective. This term needs a definition.

shin: noun. The front part of the leg below the knee; the front edge of the shin bone: Shinbone on Wikipedia.
ship: noun. A water - borne vessel generally larger than a boat.
shop: noun. An establishment that sells goods or services to the public; originally only a physical location, but now a virtual establishment as
shopping: verb. present participle and gerund of shop
sigh: verb. To inhale a larger quantity of air than usual, and immediately expel it; to make a deep single audible respiration, especially as the
sign: noun. A visible fact that shows that something exists or may happen.
sip: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Sikkimese.

snip: verb. To cut with short sharp actions, as with scissors.

song: noun. A musical composition with lyrics for voice or voices, performed by singing.
sop: symbol. ISO 639-3 language code for Songe.
